title: OSCORE Context: WINDOW_SIZE constant referenced but not defined in scope
description: In rust/lichen-oscore/src/lib.rs check_replay(), the code references 'WINDOW_SIZE' constant in the comparison 'if shift >= WINDOW_SIZE'. However, WINDOW_SIZE is defined as a local const inside the function ('const WINDOW_SIZE: u32 = 32;' was removed in the diff). Need to verify that WINDOW_SIZE is still defined somewhere accessible. If it was removed, this is a compilation error. Looking at the diff, it appears the local const was removed but the variable is still used.
close_reason: False positive: WINDOW_SIZE is defined at module level (line 84) as 'pub const WINDOW_SIZE: u32 = 32'. The diff showed it was removed from the local function scope and hoisted to module level with other nonce constants.
